profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Asia Pramulia Tbk engages in the manufacturing of plastic packaging. The company offers horeka packaging, oil packaging, personal care packaging, chemical and lubricant packaging, pet cans, food and biscuit packaging, water gallon and AMDK packaging, paint packaging, and bottle and jar caps, as well as aluminium easy open ends and egg trays. PT Asia Pramulia Tbk was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.
